zh.title: 雷·库兹韦尔预言全集 - 未来学家对科技奇点的17条预言与验证 | Ray Kurzweil Predictions
zh.description: 美国未来学家雷·库兹韦尔（1948-）的17条科技预言完整收录，涵盖人工智能、虚拟现实、纳米技术、太阳能、奇点等领域。已应验预言包括智能手机普及、语音识别、电脑击败国际象棋冠军等。

en.title: Ray Kurzweil Predictions - 17 Technology Forecasts from the Futurist (1948-present) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: American futurist Ray Kurzweil's 17 technology predictions covering AI, virtual reality, nanotechnology, solar energy, and the Singularity. Verified predictions include smartphone ubiquity, speech recognition, computer chess victory, and more.

en.twitterDescription: 17 predictions from futurist Ray Kurzweil. Verified: smartphone ubiquity, speech recognition, computer chess. Predictions extend to 2045 Singularity.
